query:
INSERT INTO deployments (deploymentId, releaseName, relatedBatch, deploymentDate, deploymentOwner, productOwner, platform, type, status, environment, summary) VALUES
('DEP-2026-0115-001', 'FC v1.0 — Foundation Core Release', 'FC', '2026-01-15', 'Jenniver Stafford', 'Product Owner', 'Platform', 'Batch', 'Deployed', 'Dev', 'Initial infrastructure deployment. CI/CD pipeline operational.'),
('DEP-2026-0201-001', 'B1 v1.0 — File Ingestion Release', 'B1', '2026-02-01', 'Jenniver Stafford', 'Product Owner', 'PDC', 'Batch', 'Deployed', 'Dev', 'File ingestion pipeline live. DocumentId and JobId assignment verified.'),
('DEP-2026-0215-001', 'B2 v1.0 — Normalization Release', 'B2', '2026-02-15', 'Jenniver Stafford', 'Product Owner', 'PDC', 'Batch', 'Deployed', 'Dev', 'Normalization and Cross-LOB Taxonomy contracts published.'),
('DEP-2026-0301-001', 'B3 v1.0 — Tax Domain Authority Release', 'B3', '2026-03-01', 'Jenniver Stafford', 'Product Owner', 'TDC', 'Batch', 'Deployed', 'Dev', 'TaxFormTemplates and ConfidenceBandThresholds loaded.'),
('DEP-2026-0401-001', 'B4 v1.0 — AI Mapping Release', 'B4', '2026-04-01', 'Jenniver Stafford', 'Product Owner', 'TDC', 'Batch', 'Deployed', 'Dev', 'AI mapping proposals live. TDC Records API contract published.'),
('DEP-2026-0422-001', 'B5 v1.0 — Entity Identity Release', 'B5', '2026-04-22', 'Jenniver Stafford', 'Product Owner', 'PDC', 'Batch', 'Deployed', 'Dev', 'EntityId lifecycle management and entitlement mappings live.'),
('DEP-2026-0422-002', 'B6 v1.0 — Practitioner Review Release', 'B6', '2026-04-22', 'Jenniver Stafford', 'Product Owner', 'TDC', 'Batch', 'Deployed', 'Dev', 'Practitioner decision submission and TAX_READY derivation live.'),
('DEP-2026-0501-001', 'B7 v1.0 — Client Tax Profile Release', 'B7', '2026-05-01', 'Jenniver Stafford', 'Product Owner', 'TDC', 'Batch', 'Deployed', 'Dev', 'Three-Tier Eligibility determination and jurisdiction flags live.'),
('DEP-2026-0512-001', 'B8 v1.0 — Exceptions & Remediation Release', 'B8', '2026-05-12', 'Jenniver Stafford', 'Product Owner', 'Both', 'Batch', 'In Progress', 'Dev', 'PDC exception pipeline deployed. TDC remediation workflow in validation.'),
('DEP-2026-0521-001', 'B9 v0.9 — Roger Gateway Pre-Release', 'B9', '2026-05-21', 'Jenniver Stafford', 'Product Owner', 'PDC', 'Batch', 'In Progress', 'Dev', 'Roger Gateway consumer access layer in active development. IMS integration pending B9A.'),
('DEP-2026-0603-001', 'B10 v0.1 — Return Assembly Planning Deploy', 'B10', '2026-06-03', 'Jenniver Stafford', 'Product Owner', 'TDC', 'Batch', 'Planned', 'Dev', 'Scaffold deployment for Return Assembly and Lineage Closure workstream.'),
('DEP-2026-0429-001', 'B2A v1.0 — Contract Enforcement Release', 'B2A', '2026-04-29', 'Jenniver Stafford', 'Product Owner', 'PDC', 'Batch', 'Deployed', 'Dev', 'FirmTaxonomyId enforcement and classification rejection audit log live.');
